description: A forkable ghostly character: face + voice-DSP identity. Inherits structural bits (contours, transition) from a built-in `base` archetype and overrides the tunable fields. The canonical schema for `pack` is the ghostly crate's CharacterPack.

main.description: A character definition in the author's repo. Worn by personas via at.freeq.persona#face.pack.

base.description: Built-in ghostly archetype supplying contours + transition (e.g. 'oblivion', 'eliza').

pack.description: The ghostly CharacterPack as serialized JSON (geometry, palette, render config, voice profile). ghostly is the canonical schema.

forkedFrom.description: The character this was forked from (its at:// URI). Absent on an original.
